The Sparta Launch
Bonus
How to sell high-priced, small-group
events with just a few emails…
What types of offers to sell with the Sparta
Launch:
• High-priced, small group events
• Workshops
• Retreats
• Masterminds
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 7 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
The key elements for selling the Sparta
Launch:
• Experience and/or Transformation
• Exclusivity
• Convenience
Here’s a basic overview of how this
works…
Offer: Put together an amazing offer
• It incorporates the 3 key points
• Experience and/or Transformation
• Exclusivity
• Convenience
• Priced 10-20x more than your normal offer
• Limited
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 7 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Email: Send a great email about the
experience or transformation
• Consider using a story to share what the
experience will be
• Stack the offer
• It’s very expensive – and that exclusivity is a
benefit
• Tease scarcity in your email
• CTA is to apply for limited spot (the click takes
them to a survey)
Application: The survey has 3 key
questions (+contact)
• The order of the questions is extremely important
• Ask the essay questions first
• Then ask for contact info
• Then reveal price
• Give them enough room in the survey question
block to really tell their story (make it at least 80
characters wide, 8 lines)
Application: The survey has 3 key
questions (+contact)
• Q1: Tell me why do you want to come to this
event. What do you want to get out of this
experience?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 7 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Application: The survey has 3 key
questions (+contact)
• Q2: Space is very limited and I want to make sure
this is a good fit. Why should I choose you?
Application: The survey has 3 key
questions (+contact)
• Please fill out the following so I can follow up with
you (contact info – name, address, phone
(cellphone), email)
Application: The survey has 3 key
questions (+contact)
• Q3: The price for this once in a lifetime
experience is $X per person - please check yes if
you are willing to pay this amount. (This is not a
commitment I just need to know you’re serious so
I can follow up with you.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 7 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
Follow-up: Set a time for follow-up call
• IF they answered yes to the last question, then…
• Email or text them (or have assistant follow-up) to
schedule a follow-up call with you
Follow-up Call: Get on the phone and close
the sale
• On the call, ask them the questions you had them
answer in the survey
• If they are a good fit…
• Summarize their answers
• Tell them the price
• Let them know you (or your assistant) will email
them details to pay and once their payment is
received their registration will be confirmed
Follow-up Call: Get on the phone and close
the sale
• If during your call you realize they are not a good
fit…
• Disqualify them (but let them down gently -
don’t hang up or reject them on the phone)
• Let them know you still have to interview
several other candidates and you’ll email them
your verdict after you’ve considered all the
applications
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 7 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	6
Follow-up Email with payment details:
• Send an email recapping the experience /
transformation
• And instructions on how to pay (link to order
form, mailing address for sending in a check, etc.)
Final step: Deliver an amazing event!
To recap:
• Create an amazing offer
• Send an email to sell it
• CTA is to apply (link to survey)
• Schedule and conduct a phone interview
• Email them a full event recap and payment details
• Deliver an amazing event
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
